Application Loading Error

The Job Selection System failed to load properly. This is likely due to browser security restrictions when running from the file system.

Error Details:

Error: JavaScript module loading error

File: Unknown

Solutions:

  1. Try Chrome with special flags:
    Close Chrome and run this command:
    "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe" --allow-file-access-from-files "C:\JSS\dist\index.html"
  2. Use Firefox:
    Open Firefox, navigate to about:config, search for security.fileuri.strict_origin_policy and set it to false
  3. Use a local server:
    If you have Node.js installed, open command prompt in the JSS folder and run:
    npx serve dist
    Then open http://localhost:3000 in your browser

For detailed instructions: See the TROUBLESHOOTING.md file in the JSS folder.
